title: Verify Happy Path: User sets a reminder instead of canceling
description: Tests the primary success flow where a user, intending to cancel, is successfully nudged to set a reminder and continue their trial.
preconditions: User has an active ₹1 trial for less than 24 hours.
User is part of the 'Trial Corner' experiment cohort (no content watched in first 5 mins).
User is on the 'Trial Corner' hub page.

steps.description: 1. Click the 'Cancel Trial' button in the 'Manage Trial' section.
2. Observe the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up with the headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days.'
3. Click the primary action button: 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder'.
4. Verify the pop-up closes and the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle is now enabled on the Trial Corner hub.

expected_result: The user successfully sets a reminder, the trial remains active, and the 'remind-me-clicked' event is triggered with 'cancel pop-up' as the page source.
